languages.text: "Нарушений установленной процедуры сбора {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Имперской Десятины{/g} не зафиксировано как минимум в последних десяти итерациях производственного цикла. Нарушений условий эксплуатации производственных мощностей также не зафиксировано". {n}Если Декабалус и заметил проверку, устроенную ему арбитром, то никак не демонстрирует этого.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Нарушений установленной процедуры сбора {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Имперской Десятины{/g} не зафиксировано как минимум в последних десяти итерациях производственного цикла. Нарушений условий эксплуатации производственных мощностей также не зафиксировано". {n}Если Декабалус и заметил проверку, устроенную ему арбитром, то никак не демонстрирует этого.{/n}

languages.text: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

languages.text: 「情報：少なくとも過去10回の生産サイクルにおいて、皇貢の徴収手順に違反した記録は存在しない。生産施設の稼働条件に違反した記録も存在しない。」{n}もしデカバルスが仲裁者の検査に気づいていたならば、それを明かさないだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Information: no violations of the established Imperial Tithe collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「情報：少なくとも過去10回の生産サイクルにおいて、皇貢の徴収手順に違反した記録は存在しない。生産施設の稼働条件に違反した記録も存在しない。」{n}もしデカバルスが仲裁者の検査に気づいていたならば、それを明かさないだろう。{/n}

languages.text: “在过去至少十次生产周期迭代中，未记录到任何违背{g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}帝国什一税{/g}既定征收程序的行为。生产设施的运转状况亦无任何违规。”{n}或许德卡巴洛斯察觉到了法务官的审视，但他表现得不动声色。{/n}
languages.original_text: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “在过去至少十次生产周期迭代中，未记录到任何违背{g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}帝国什一税{/g}既定征收程序的行为。生产设施的运转状况亦无任何违规。”{n}或许德卡巴洛斯察觉到了法务官的审视，但他表现得不动声色。{/n}

languages.text: «No se han registrado violaciones del procedimiento de recolección del {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Diezmo Imperial{/g} en al menos diez ciclos de producción. Tampoco se han producido violaciones de las condiciones operativas de las instalaciones de producción». {n}Si Decabalus se ha percatado de la inspección del Arbitrator, no lo demuestra.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No se han registrado violaciones del procedimiento de recolección del {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Diezmo Imperial{/g} en al menos diez ciclos de producción. Tampoco se han producido violaciones de las condiciones operativas de las instalaciones de producción». {n}Si Decabalus se ha percatado de la inspección del Arbitrator, no lo demuestra.{/n}

languages.text: "Es wurden mindestens in den letzten zehn Iterationen des Produktionszyklus keine Verletzungen der etablierten Erhebungsprozedur des {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}imperialen Zehnts{/g} registriert. Überdies gab es keine Verletzungen der Betriebsbedingungen der Produktionsanlagen." {n}Falls Decabalus die Inspektion des Arbitrators bemerkt hat, lässt er es sich nicht anmerken.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Es wurden mindestens in den letzten zehn Iterationen des Produktionszyklus keine Verletzungen der etablierten Erhebungsprozedur des {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}imperialen Zehnts{/g} registriert. Überdies gab es keine Verletzungen der Betriebsbedingungen der Produktionsanlagen." {n}Falls Decabalus die Inspektion des Arbitrators bemerkt hat, lässt er es sich nicht anmerken.{/n}

languages.text: « Aucune infraction à la procédure établie de collecte de la {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}dîme impériale{/g} n'a été enregistrée depuis au moins dix itérations du cycle de production. Nous n'avons pas non plus relevé de violations des conditions de fonctionnement des sites de production. » {n}Si Decabalus a remarqué l'inspection de l'arbitrator, il ne le montre pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "No violations of the established {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}Imperial Tithe{/g} collection procedure have been recorded in at least the last ten iterations of the production cycle. There have also been no violations of the production facilities' operating conditions." {n}If Decabalus has noticed the Arbitrator's inspection, he does not reveal it.{/n}

Nous n'avons pas non plus relevé de violations des conditions de fonctionnement des sites de production. » {n}Si Decabalus a remarqué l'inspection de l'arbitrator, il ne le montre pas.{/n}

languages.text: "Üretim döngüsünün en azından son on yinelemesinde belirlenmiş {g|Encyclopedia:TitheGlossary}İmparatorluk Aşarı{/g} toplama prosedürünün ihlali kaydedilmemiştir. Üretim tesislerinin çalışma koşullarında da herhangi bir ihlal olmamıştır." {n}Decabalus, Yargıç'ın incelemesini fark ettiyse bile bunu belli etmiyor.{/n}
